data.raceComments: {"comment":"What was a good maiden has been decimated by scratchings. It leaves 8. UPSTAGE as the horse to beat, and the clear one at that. She has just found one better in both runs this time in, beaten a nose at Geelong when last seen. She'll be hard to hold out from a low draw in a race that now lacks any sort of depth. 4. JENNI BAM BAM comes into second pick. She's a filly by Alabama Express for the Kennewell yard who has won a trial leading in at Traralgon. Have to respect off that showing, she should measure up. Then we're down to 11. WYNORRIFIC, a filly by Shocking for the Browne yard on debut. She will probably want a fair bit further in time but could surprise. 9. VESPERS struggled on debut at Geelong but is open to improvement.","runners":[8,4,11,9],"exclusive":false}
